recommendations.title: Far from Men
recommendations.overview: A French teacher in a small Algerian village during the Algerian War forms an unexpected bond with a dissident who is ordered to be turned in to the authorities.

recommendations.title: Wild Reeds
recommendations.overview: As the Algerian War draws to a close, a teenager with a girlfriend starts feeling homosexual urges for two of his classmates: a country boy, and a French-Algerian intellectual.

recommendations.title: The Battle of Algiers
recommendations.overview: Paratrooper commander Colonel Mathieu, a former French Resistance fighter during World War II, is sent to Algeria to reinforce efforts to squelch the uprisings of the Algerian War. There he faces Ali la Pointe, a former petty criminal who, as the lea

recommendations.title: Problemos
recommendations.overview: When a pandemic strikes the world, Victor and his family get stuck within a hippie community.

recommendations.title: Fatima
recommendations.overview: Fatima, an Algerian-born woman who now lives in France with her two teenage daughters, with whom she is barely able to communicate.

recommendations.title: One Man and his Cow
recommendations.overview: An Algerian man's life-long dream finally comes true when he receives an invitation to take his cow Jacqueline to the Paris International Agriculture Fair.

recommendations.title: Outside the Law
recommendations.overview: After losing their family home in Algeria in the 1920s, three brothers and their mother are scattered across the globe. Messaoud joins the French army fighting in Indochina; Abdelkader becomes a leader of the Algerian independence movement in France

recommendations.title: 2 Alone in Paris
recommendations.overview: A bumbling Paris policeman is doggedly determined to capture the master thief that repeatedly eludes him, even when they're the last two men on Earth.

recommendations.title: Papicha
recommendations.overview: Nedjma, an 18-year-old student passionate about fashion design refuses to let the tragic events of the Algerian Civil War keep her from experiencing a normal life. As the social climate becomes more conservative, she rejects the new bans set by the r

recommendations.title: Watchmen
recommendations.overview: In a gritty and alternate 1985, the glory days of costumed vigilantes have been brought to a close by a government crackdown. But after one of the masked veterans is brutally murdered, an investigation into the killer is initiated. The reunited heroe
